states.description: Android home screen with app shortcuts and dock
Alphabetical list/grid of all installed applications
Notification shade with quick settings tiles
Context menu shown on home screen long-press

visual_cues: Add app icons to home screen toggle

states.description: Detailed view of a specific Wi-Fi network

visual_cues: No VPNs added message or list of VPN entries
Private DNS provider hostname radio + text field

states.description: Full alphabetical list of installed apps
App info page for a specific app
Detail view for a specific permission (e.g., Location, Contacts)
visual_cues: Allow / Ask every time / Don't allow radios

states.description: Storage page for a specific app
visual_cues: Space used breakdown (App size, User data, Cache, Total)

states.description: Battery usage profile for a specific app

visual_cues: May say 'data will be available...' when freshly charged
No schedule / Based on your routine / Based on percentage radios
Categories: System, Apps, Audio, Videos, Images, Trash
What can interrupt section: People, Apps, Alarms & other interruptions
Starred contacts / Contacts / Anyone / None radios
Starred contacts / Priority conversations / None radios
Alarms / Media sounds / Touch sounds / Reminders / Calendar events toggles

states.description: Digital Wellbeing dashboard with per-app usage

visual_cues: Show all / Hide sensitive / Don't show notifications radios

states.description: Blocked numbers list in the Phone app

visual_cues: First name, Last name, Phone fields

strategies.name: OPEN_SETTINGS_FROM_HOME
steps: swipe up to open app drawer
if Settings not visible, swipe up to scroll alphabetically
alternative: swipe down from top twice to fully expand Quick Settings then tap gear icon
strategies.success_signal: Settings main menu is displayed
strategies.fallback: If wrong app launched, press Home and retry

strategies.name: TOGGLE_BATTERY_PERCENTAGE
strategies.success_signal: Battery percentage visible in status bar

strategies.name: ENABLE_BATTERY_SAVER
steps: optionally disable 'Turn off when charged' if device charging
strategies.success_signal: Toggle in ON state and system UI changes (dark theme/red battery icon)

strategies.name: CONFIGURE_BATTERY_SAVER_SCHEDULE
steps: select 'Based on your routine' or other option
click OK on info dialog if shown
strategies.success_signal: Selected schedule radio shows as active

strategies.name: ADD_VPN_PROFILE
steps: click(+) to open Edit VPN profile
scroll down (dismiss keyboard if needed) to reveal Username/Password
fill Username, Password, and IPSec identifier if Save remains disabled
strategies.success_signal: New profile appears in VPN list
strategies.fallback: If Save grayed, fill IPSec identifier or other hidden required fields

strategies.name: MODIFY_WIFI_NETWORK_DETAILS
steps: ensure Wi-Fi toggle is ON, wait for scan if needed
tap gear icon next to target network (or open Saved networks then network)
toggle Auto-connect / change Network usage / tap Forget as needed
strategies.success_signal: Network details reflect changes; network removed from saved list if forgotten

strategies.name: SET_PRIVATE_DNS
steps: select desired mode (Off / Automatic / Private DNS provider hostname)
strategies.success_signal: Private DNS row shows new mode/hostname

strategies.name: CHANGE_HOTSPOT_NAME
steps: long-press existing text to select, type new name
strategies.success_signal: Hotspot name field shows new value

strategies.name: CONFIGURE_NEARBY_SHARE
strategies.success_signal: Toggle ON and visibility selection highlighted

strategies.name: CHANGE_APP_BATTERY_USAGE_PROFILE
steps: search or scroll to find target app
strategies.success_signal: Selected radio active
strategies.fallback: Use search to avoid scrolling errors

strategies.name: CLEAR_APP_STORAGE_OR_CACHE
steps: confirm Delete on dialog if shown
strategies.success_signal: Cache/storage value shows 0 B; buttons become disabled

strategies.name: UNINSTALL_APP_VIA_INFO
strategies.success_signal: App icon removed from drawer

strategies.name: TOGGLE_APP_NOTIFICATION_DOT
steps: scroll if needed to find Allow notification dot
strategies.success_signal: Toggle state flips (gray when off)
strategies.fallback: If tap on toggle fails, tap label area instead

strategies.name: REVOKE_APP_PERMISSION
steps: confirm 'Don't allow anyway' if warning appears
strategies.success_signal: Permission appears under Not allowed

strategies.name: CHANGE_DEFAULT_APP
strategies.success_signal: Radio selected and parent row reflects new default

strategies.name: CONFIGURE_DND_INTERRUPTIONS
steps: click(People) to set Messages and Calls allowances
click(Alarms & other interruptions) to toggle Alarms/Media/Touch sounds/Reminders/Calendar events
for Apps section, drill in to revoke per-app interruptions
strategies.success_signal: DND subsections reflect required state (e.g., 'No one can interrupt', 'Alarms and media can interrupt')

strategies.name: SET_DND_HIDDEN_NOTIFICATIONS_DISPLAY
steps: scroll to Display options for hidden notifications
strategies.success_signal: Selected option highlighted
strategies.fallback: Re-tap if first tap doesn't register at bottom of screen

strategies.name: SET_APP_DAILY_TIMER
steps: scroll down, click(Digital Wellbeing & parental controls)
tap hourglass icon next to app
tap hour/min picker fields, type values
strategies.success_signal: Toast 'App timer set for X' and hourglass shows duration

strategies.name: QUERY_SCREEN_TIME
steps: view summary on Digital Wellbeing main
strategies.success_signal: Required values are visible to answer

strategies.name: BLOCK_NUMBER_IN_PHONE_APP
strategies.success_signal: Number appears in blocked list
strategies.fallback: If input field empty after dialog reopen, tap field to focus then retype

strategies.name: CREATE_CONTACT
steps: fill First name, Last name, Phone
optionally tap star icon to favorite
strategies.success_signal: Contact appears in list with star if favorited
strategies.fallback: If number rejected (e.g., emergency number), substitute placeholder number

strategies.name: QUERY_APP_STORAGE_USAGE
steps: click(Apps) -> click(See all N apps) or use search
strategies.success_signal: Numeric values visible to report
strategies.fallback: For system apps, in All apps use three-dot menu -> Show system

strategies.name: FORGET_WIFI_NETWORK
strategies.success_signal: Network removed from Saved networks list

strategies.name: CONFIGURE_HOME_SETTINGS
steps: long-press empty area of home screen
toggle Notification dots / Add app icons / Allow rotation
tap Suggestions submenu and disable 'Suggestions on Home screen'
strategies.success_signal: Toggles persist as expected (re-enter to verify)
strategies.fallback: Decline 'Get app suggestions' prompt with 'No thanks'

dead_ends.failed_action: tap specific 2-hour time slot on chart
dead_ends.note: Data unavailable shortly after full charge; chart shows placeholder. Cannot select sub-period.
Required fields (Username, Password, IPSec identifier) hidden under keyboard; must fill all to enable Save

dead_ends.failed_action: save contact with emergency phone number (e.g., 911)
dead_ends.note: System blocks saving emergency numbers; use placeholder digits
Toggle hit-target small; repeated taps may not register. Tap row label instead
App drawer scrolls vertically, not paginated horizontally

dead_ends.failed_action: search for system app like 'Android System Intelligence'
dead_ends.note: System apps hidden by default; must enable 'Show system' from three-dot menu

dead_ends.failed_action: click gear from partially expanded shade
dead_ends.note: Settings gear only visible after second swipe down to fully expand

dead_ends.failed_action: open network details immediately after enabling Wi-Fi
dead_ends.note: Need to wait for scan to complete before networks appear

dead_ends.failed_action: tap top app expecting target app
dead_ends.note: Easy to misclick adjacent alphabetical entries (e.g., AndroidWorld vs Android Auto)

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Agent is somewhere in the OS (home, drawer, or another settings page)
abstract_steps: Determine target settings section based on instruction keyword
Reach top-level settings (via app drawer or quick-settings gear)
Drill down through hierarchical menu, scrolling when target row not visible
Use search affordance when present to bypass long lists
Verify arrival by reading screen header
failure_modes: Misclick on adjacent menu row
Target section requires scrolling and is missed
Wrong sibling section opened (e.g., similar names)
Quick-settings entry partially expanded so shortcut not visible
verification_checklist: Header text matches target section
Expected child controls are visible
Back navigation returns to the correct parent

categories.name: TOGGLE_SETTING
categories.precondition: On a settings page that contains the toggle for the target feature
abstract_steps: Locate the row containing the toggle (scroll if needed)
Observe current state of the toggle
Tap the toggle (or the row label as a larger hit target)
Confirm any modal dialog if prompted
failure_modes: Tap misses small toggle hit area
Visual state lags so user retoggles back
Confirmation dialog dismissed accidentally
Setting depends on another precondition (e.g., parent toggle off)
verification_checklist: Toggle visual indicates desired state
Subtext under setting reflects change
Re-entering screen still shows new state

categories.name: SELECT_OPTION_FROM_LIST
categories.precondition: A radio/checkbox chooser dialog or screen is visible
abstract_steps: Scan options to find one matching instruction
Tap the option's radio/checkbox
Confirm with Save/OK if dialog provides such button
failure_modes: Selecting nearest visible option instead of exact match
Forgetting to confirm with Save/OK causing no persistence
Option disabled because of an unmet precondition
verification_checklist: Chosen option shows selected indicator
Parent row subtext reflects new choice

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Editable text field is accessible (may require focusing field)
abstract_steps: Tap the field to focus and bring up keyboard
Select existing text if needed (long-press) and overwrite
Type the new value
Confirm via OK/Save/Done
failure_modes: Keyboard hides Save button preventing tap
Field still considered empty due to focus issue
Save remains disabled because other required fields not yet filled
verification_checklist: Field displays the new value
Save button becomes enabled
Parent screen subtext updates

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: On a list screen with affordance to add a new item (+ button or 'Add' entry)
abstract_steps: Tap the add affordance to open the creation form
Fill all required fields
Reveal hidden required fields by dismissing keyboard/scrolling
Submit via Save
Handle validation errors (e.g., add missing required field)
failure_modes: Save remains disabled due to hidden mandatory fields
Validation rejects a specific value (must substitute)
Form resets due to navigation error
verification_checklist: New entry visible in list after save
No error toast
Re-open entry to confirm fields persisted

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Detail view of the item contains a delete/forget/uninstall/clear affordance
abstract_steps: Open the entry's detail page
Tap the destructive action button
Confirm in any warning dialog
failure_modes: Confirmation dialog dismissed instead of confirmed
Action button hidden until scrolling
System protection prevents deletion (e.g., system app)
verification_checklist: Item no longer appears in parent list
Sizes / counts reset to zero where applicable

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Required value resides on some detail page within Settings
abstract_steps: Navigate to the relevant settings section
Read the visible value associated with the requested label
When multiple values needed, navigate or scroll to gather all
Combine and format the answer per instruction
failure_modes: Misreading a similarly named field
Required value not yet populated (e.g., recently charged)
Hidden under system filter / requires 'Show system'
verification_checklist: Value matches the on-screen label exactly
Units included when requested
All requested datapoints reported

categories.name: CONFIGURE_PER_ITEM
categories.precondition: There is a per-item settings page accessible from a list (e.g., per-app)
abstract_steps: Open the list of items
Use search or scroll to find the target
Open its detail page
Apply changes via TOGGLE_SETTING, SELECT_OPTION_FROM_LIST, or EDIT_ENTRY
failure_modes: Wrong item opened due to similar names
Target item filtered out (system app hidden)
Item not in 'Recently opened' shortcut list
verification_checklist: Detail page header matches the target item
Modified value persists after navigating away and back

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_WRONG_SCREEN
categories.precondition: Agent has navigated to an unintended screen or app
abstract_steps: Use Back button to step out of unintended screen
If too deep or wrong app entirely, press Home to reset
Re-execute the intended navigation strategy
failure_modes: Back navigation skips too far
Repeated misclicks on the same wrong row
Confusing similar app names
verification_checklist: Reach the intended screen as confirmed by header
Original task progress not lost (re-verify prior state)
